ddls:
CREATE TABLE "safety_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "aircraft_miles_millions" REAL /* Total aircraft miles flown in millions */,
  "fatalities_rate" REAL /* Rate of fatalities per 100 million aircraft miles */,
  "seriously_injured_rate" REAL /* Rate of seriously injured persons per 100 million aircraft miles */,
  "total_accidents_rate" REAL /* Rate of total accidents per 100 million aircraft miles */,
  "fatalities" REAL /* Total number of fatalities */,
  "seriously_injured" REAL /* Total number of seriously injured persons */,
  "total_accidents" REAL /* Total number of accidents */,
  "total_fatal_accidents" REAL /* Total number of fatal accidents */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the data is collected */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the data is collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft operator */,
  "operator_type" TEXT /* Type of the operator (e.g., commercial airline, private operator) */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the operator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the operator */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the operator is based */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the operator was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Total number of aircraft in the operator's fleet */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the operator */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_introduced" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  "range_km" INTEGER /* Maximum range of the aircraft in kilometers */,
  "cruise_speed_kmph" INTEGER /* Typical cruise speed of the aircraft in kilometers per hour */,
  "fuel_capacity_liters" INTEGER /* Fuel capacity of the aircraft in liters */,
  "safety_features" TEXT /* Notable safety features of the aircraft */,
  "last_safety_audit_year" INTEGER /* Year of the last safety audit for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the incident */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft operator involved */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft model involved */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., crash, emergency landing) */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on board */,
  "total_crew" INTEGER /* Total number of crew members on board */,
  "phase_of_flight" TEXT /* Phase of flight during which the incident occurred */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "emergency_services_response_time" INTEGER /* Response time of emergency services in minutes */,
  "investigation_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation began */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES aircraft_operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES aircraft_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatal_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatal incident (references the incidents table) */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the fatal incident (e.g., mechanical failure, pilot error) */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "investigating_authority" TEXT /* Authority conducting the investigation */,
  "survivors" INTEGER /* Number of survivors in the incident */,
  "victims_age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the ages of the victims */,
  "victims_gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the genders of the victims */,
  "final_investigation_report_link" TEXT /* Link to the final investigation report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "access_duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "data_downloaded_mb" REAL /* Amount of data downloaded in megabytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES safety_data ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the report covers */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft operator the report pertains to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft model the report pertains to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region covered by the report */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country covered by the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "key_findings" TEXT /* Key findings of the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations made in the report */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_reports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES safety_data ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_reports_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES aircraft_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_reports_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES aircraft_operators ("operator_id")
)
